title: Three AIADMK rebel MLAs quit, eye TVK switch; Palaniswami alleges ‘pre-planned conspiracy’
description: Three rebel AIADMK MLAs have resigned to join the ruling TVK party, reducing AIADMK's strength in the Assembly. This move has led to accusations of horse-trading from opposition parties, amidst ongoing factional tensions within AIADMK following recent electoral defeats.
